domain: Sami lavvu cone-tent (Nordic indigenous, Lappland, multi-millennia): wind-baffle 4-pole stable cone frame, smoke-vent regulator at apex, reindeer-skin layered membrane, canonical angle deflection, per-orientation re-pitch on weather change.
specific_mechanism: LAVVU-4-POLE-WIND-DEFLECT-VENT-REGULATOR-LAYERED-MEMBRANE-RE-PITCH: (1) F_4pole stable cone-frame; (2) W_wind canonical-angle deflection; (3) V_smoke top-hole gradient regulator; (4) M_layer skin-reindeer layered membrane damping; (5) R_pitch re-pitch reset.
llm_application: LAVVU mechanism + F_4pole + W_wind + V_smoke + M_layer + R_pitch. Differs from R512 R537 R563. Differs from LCLActiveDamping + HinfActiveDamp + MultiLayerHall + LCLDamping + LCLSupp by 4-pole + canonical wind + smoke-vent regulator + reindeer-skin layer + re-pitch.
novelty_claim: Damping literature broad. LAVVU adds 5-mechanism composite. K=5.
